compiled_state.title: Add commit workflow event emission to COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md to add emit-commit-workflow-event.sh calls:

1. Start event: Add call with --phase=start BEFORE any timeout-prone steps (before test/lint/review). Must be committed to orphan branch durably so SIGURG (exit 144) cannot lose it. Place after Step 0 (clear stale artifacts) and before Step 1 (pre-commit auto-fix).

2. End event: Add call with --phase=end --success=true at commit success exit, and --phase=end --success=false --failure-reason=<reason> at failure exits.

Incomplete commits are detectable as unpaired start events (start without matching end in the same session).

## TDD Requirement
Exemption criterion 3: prose workflow doc, no conditional logic.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Start event before timeout-prone steps
  Verify: grep -q "emit-commit-workflow-event.*--phase=start" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] End event at success exit
  Verify: grep -q "emit-commit-workflow-event.*--phase=end.*--success=true" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] End event at failure exit
  Verify: grep -q "emit-commit-workflow-event.*--phase=end.*--success=false" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: All three emit calls added to COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md. Start event at Step 0.9 (after Step 0.5, before Step 1). End-success event after Step 6 commit. End-failure event documented as a blockquote instruction in Step 0.9 for all failure exits. All three grep acceptance criteria verified passing.
comments.author: Main
